name: METATROPIC DYSPLASIA
dominant_finding: "hourglass" phalanges (= short phalanges with widened ends)
discriminating_features: coccygeal appendage similar to a tail (rare but CHARACTERISTIC)
long bones short with dumbbell-like / trumpet-shaped configuration (= exaggerated

wide separation of major joint spaces (thick articular cartilage)
delayed ossification of flat irregular epiphyses
